title: Encrypted Range
description: Specifies a portion of a buffer that is encrypted.

byteOffset.description: The offset into the buffer in bytes where this encrypted range starts.

byteLength.description: The length in bytes of this encrypted range. The sum of byteOffset and byteLength must not exceed the buffer's byteLength.

iv.description: The initialization vector used for encryption of this range. Should be 12 bytes. Standard Base64 (RFC 4648 §4); padding is mandatory when needed.

authTag.description: The authentication tag for this encrypted range. Provides integrity verification of the encrypted data. Should be 16 bytes. Standard Base64 (RFC 4648 §4); padding is mandatory when needed.
